## What changed

Describe the focused change and its ecological use case.

## Method and assumptions

State formulas, interpretation boundaries, and compatibility effects.

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Updated English and Chinese documentation when user-facing
- [ ] Verified package, citation, and code versions agree
